violations.text: Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s), including the milk dispenser dairy storage unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
Cartons of ice cream were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
Cartons of ice cream were observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024

Kitchen/serving utensils observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2024
